trans-unit.source: New Password
New Password repetition
You have requested the deletion of your user account. We have sent you an email with a link to confirm the deletion.
I accept the terms of use.
I accept the privacy policy.
I consent to the publication of my username in connection with edited digital copies.
I consent to the publication of my username in statistical surveys and analyses.
Your account has been created successfully. We've sent you an email with an activation link. Please check your inbox to complete the activation.
Deletion of your user account on %1$s
Your registration at %1$s
Confirmation of the deletion of your user account on %1$s
Hello
a user account has been set up for you on the WLB crowdsourcing platform.
Activate your account by clicking the following link:
If you have not registered, please click the following link:
You have requested the deletion of your user account on %1$s.
You have agreed to the deletion of your user account on %1$s. Your user account has been deleted.
Please click the following link:
Delete user account

Best regards, Your "Sammlung Proteste" team ___ Württembergische Landesbibliothek Sammlung Proteste Tel.: +49 (0) 711 / 13798 - 541 mitmachen@wlb-stuttgart.de www.mitmachen.wlb-stuttgart.de www.wlb-stuttgart.de/sammlungen/sammlung-proteste/
